settings.emptySectionNote: No settings in this section are available with the current selections.

slotSize.label: Slot Size & Spacing
slotSize.desc: Size, spacing, and structural dimensions for each window slot.

windowTitle.label: Window Title
windowTitle.desc: Font and visibility for window titles inside slots.

focusedTitle.label: Focused Window Title
focusedTitle.desc: Color styling for the centered focused-window title shown when slots are hidden.

workspaceIndicator.label: Workspace Indicator
workspaceIndicator.desc: Show the active workspace outside the scrolling strip so it remains visible.

edgeFade.label: Edge Overflow Cue
edgeFade.desc: How the widget marks hidden content at the leading and trailing edges.

background.label: Widget Background
background.desc: Background fill for the entire widget strip.

activeWindow.label: Active Window
activeWindow.desc: Colors and borders for the currently focused window.

inactiveWindows.label: Inactive Windows
inactiveWindows.desc: Appearance of idle, background window slots.

hoveredWindow.label: Hovered Window
hoveredWindow.desc: Colors, borders, and animation when hovering a slot.

workspaceIndicatorColors.label: Workspace Indicator
workspaceIndicatorColors.desc: Color styling for the external workspace label.

indicators.label: Track & Focus Indicator
indicators.desc: The position track and focused-slot indicator line.

windowFiltering.label: Window Filtering
windowFiltering.desc: Control which windows appear in the strip.

interaction.label: Interaction
interaction.desc: Mouse and drag behavior for window slots.

autoScroll.label: Auto-Scroll
autoScroll.desc: How the strip reacts when focus changes.

workspaceAnimation.label: Workspace Change Animation
workspaceAnimation.desc: Animate the whole widget when the active workspace changes.

onlySameOutput.label: Only same monitor
onlySameOutput.desc: Only include windows that belong to the monitor hosting this widget.

onlyActiveWorkspaces.label: Only active workspaces
onlyActiveWorkspaces.desc: Limit the strip to windows from currently active workspaces.

enableReorder.label: Enable drag reorder
enableReorder.desc: Allow drag-to-reorder on compositors that expose safe live reorder support.

debugLogging.label: Debug logging
debugLogging.desc: Write model refresh, focus, and interaction details to the shell log.

widgetSizeMode.label: Widget size mode
widgetSizeMode.desc: Choose whether the widget shrinks to content with a maximum cap or keeps a fixed visible size.

fixedWidgetSize.label: Fixed widget size
fixedWidgetSize.desc: Visible size of the widget along the strip axis. Horizontal bars use width; vertical bars use height.

maxWidgetWidth.label: Max widget width
maxWidgetWidth.desc: Maximum percentage of the bar this strip may occupy in dynamic mode before it starts clipping and fading.

showSlots.label: Show slots
showSlots.desc: Render the window slot capsules and their contents. Disable this to leave only the track and focus line visible.

slotWidth.label: Slot width
slotWidth.desc: Fixed size for each window slot along the strip axis.

showTitle.label: Show titles
showTitle.desc: Display truncated window titles next to icons on horizontal bars.

focusedTitleEnabled.label: Show focused window title
focusedTitleEnabled.desc: Show the currently focused window title centered in the widget when slots are hidden.

workspaceIndicatorEnabled.label: Show workspace indicator
workspaceIndicatorEnabled.desc: Render the active workspace label outside the strip so it stays readable even when content fades.

workspaceIndicatorLabelMode.label: Workspace label mode
workspaceIndicatorLabelMode.desc: Choose whether the indicator shows the active workspace ID or workspace name.

workspaceIndicatorPosition.label: Workspace indicator position
workspaceIndicatorPosition.desc: Place the indicator before or after the strip. On horizontal bars this maps to left or right; on vertical bars it maps to top or bottom.

workspaceIndicatorFontFamily.label: Workspace font family
workspaceIndicatorFontFamily.desc: Font family used for the workspace indicator. Leave empty for the default fixed font.

workspaceIndicatorFontSize.label: Workspace font size
workspaceIndicatorFontSize.desc: Font size override for the workspace indicator in points. Set to 0 to use the bar default.

workspaceIndicatorSpacing.label: Workspace spacing
workspaceIndicatorSpacing.desc: Gap between the workspace indicator and the strip.

workspaceIndicatorPadding.label: Workspace padding
workspaceIndicatorPadding.desc: Outer padding around the combined workspace indicator and strip layout.

iconScale.label: Icon scale
iconScale.desc: Scale the app icon inside each slot.

edgeFadeEnabled.label: Enable edge fade
edgeFadeEnabled.desc: Show a gradual fade at the edges when content overflows the visible area.

edgeFadeSize.label: Fade size
edgeFadeSize.desc: Width of the gradual fade at the overflowing edges.

edgeFadeOpacity.label: Fade opacity
edgeFadeOpacity.desc: Strength of the overflow fade into the widget background.

showTrackLine.label: Show track line
showTrackLine.desc: Render the passive position track and thumb behind the strip.

trackLinePosition.label: Track line position
trackLinePosition.desc: Place the track and focus line at the top, center, or bottom on horizontal bars, and left, center, or right on vertical bars.

trackLineThickness.label: Track line thickness
trackLineThickness.desc: Thickness of the passive track line and scrollbar thumb in pixels.

trackOpacity.label: Track opacity
trackOpacity.desc: Opacity used by the passive track line.

showFocusLine.label: Show focus line
showFocusLine.desc: Draw a thin indicator line on the track marking the focused slot position.

focusLineColor.label: Focus line color
focusLineColor.desc: Color of the focus indicator line on the track.

focusLineOpacity.label: Focus line opacity
focusLineOpacity.desc: Opacity of the focus indicator line.

focusLineThickness.label: Focus line thickness
focusLineThickness.desc: Thickness of the focus indicator line in pixels.

focusLineAnimationMs.label: Focus line animation
focusLineAnimationMs.desc: Duration of the focus indicator position and size animations.

centerFocusedWindow.label: Center focused window
centerFocusedWindow.desc: Auto-scroll the strip to keep the focused window centered.

centerAnimationMs.label: Center animation
centerAnimationMs.desc: Duration of the smooth scroll animation when centering the focused window.

workspaceAnimationEnabled.label: Animate on workspace changes
workspaceAnimationEnabled.desc: Slide the whole widget when the active workspace changes.

workspaceAnimationAxis.label: Workspace animation axis
workspaceAnimationAxis.desc: Choose whether workspace-change animation slides horizontally or vertically.

enableScrollWheel.label: Scroll wheel panning
enableScrollWheel.desc: Use the mouse wheel to pan the strip when more windows exist than fit in view. Scrolls back to the focused window when the cursor leaves the widget.

trackThumbColor.label: Track thumb color
trackThumbColor.desc: Color of the position indicator thumb on the scrollbar track.

hoverFillColor.label: Hover fill color
hoverFillColor.desc: Background tint used when hovering an unfocused slot.

hoverBorderColor.label: Hover border color
hoverBorderColor.desc: Border color used when hovering an unfocused slot.

hoverTextColor.label: Hover text color
hoverTextColor.desc: Text and fallback glyph color used on hovered slots.

hoverFillOpacity.label: Hover fill opacity
hoverFillOpacity.desc: Strength of the hover background tint.

hoverScalePercent.label: Hover scale
hoverScalePercent.desc: How much the slot grows while hovered.

hoverTransitionDurationMs.label: Hover transition duration
hoverTransitionDurationMs.desc: Animation duration used for hover scale and color changes.

slotCapsuleScale.label: Capsule height scale
slotCapsuleScale.desc: Scale the slot capsule height independently of the track line. Values below 100% shrink the capsules; values above 100% enlarge them.

focusedFillOpacity.label: Focused fill opacity
focusedFillOpacity.desc: Strength of the focused slot background tint.

focusedFillColor.label: Focused fill color
focusedFillColor.desc: Background color for the focused slot.

focusedBorderColor.label: Focused border color
focusedBorderColor.desc: Border color for the focused slot.

focusedTextColor.label: Focused text color
focusedTextColor.desc: Text and icon color for the focused slot.

focusedTitleTextColor.label: Focused title color
focusedTitleTextColor.desc: Text color used by the centered focused-window title when slots are hidden.

focusedTitleOpacity.label: Focused title opacity
focusedTitleOpacity.desc: Opacity of the centered focused-window title when slots are hidden.

showFocusedFill.label: Show focused fill
showFocusedFill.desc: Enable the background color on the focused slot.

unfocusedTextColor.label: Unfocused text color
unfocusedTextColor.desc: Text and icon color for unfocused slots.

showUnfocusedFill.label: Show unfocused fill
showUnfocusedFill.desc: Enable the background color on unfocused slots.

inactiveOpacity.label: Inactive opacity
inactiveOpacity.desc: How faint unfocused slots should appear relative to the focused slot.

showFocusedBorder.label: Show focused border
showFocusedBorder.desc: Draw a border around the focused slot.

focusedBorderOpacity.label: Focused border opacity
focusedBorderOpacity.desc: Opacity of the focused slot border.

showHoverBorder.label: Show hover border
showHoverBorder.desc: Draw a border around hovered unfocused slots.

hoverBorderOpacity.label: Hover border opacity
hoverBorderOpacity.desc: Opacity of the hover slot border.

showUnfocusedBorder.label: Show unfocused border
showUnfocusedBorder.desc: Draw a border around idle unfocused slots.

showIcons.label: Show icons
showIcons.desc: Display application icons inside each slot.

titleFontFamily.label: Title font family
titleFontFamily.desc: Font family used for window titles. Leave empty for the system default.

titleFontSize.label: Title font size
titleFontSize.desc: Font size override for titles in points. Set to 0 to use the bar default.

titleFontWeight.label: Title font weight
titleFontWeight.desc: Font weight for titles. 'Default' keeps the focused/unfocused weight logic.

iconTintColor.label: Icon tint color
iconTintColor.desc: Apply a uniform color tint over all application icons.

iconTintOpacity.label: Icon tint opacity
iconTintOpacity.desc: Strength of the icon color tint.

backgroundColor.label: Background color
backgroundColor.desc: Background fill color for the widget strip.

backgroundOpacity.label: Background opacity
backgroundOpacity.desc: Opacity of the widget strip background.

workspaceIndicatorTextColor.label: Workspace text color
workspaceIndicatorTextColor.desc: Color used for the workspace indicator text.

workspaceIndicatorOpacity.label: Workspace text opacity
workspaceIndicatorOpacity.desc: Opacity used for the workspace indicator text.
